name: RPlog_Mutual_Understanding
title: Mutual Understanding
summary: In the bustling Union Starport on Caspar, the half-breed predator Arissa, fighting the murderous urgings in her own mind, stalks the former Imperial Captain turned doctor Lynae Cassius and falls into step beside her. Drawing Lynae into the Red Door restaurant for a drink, Arissa makes veiled threats and boasts that information is worth more to her than any life, probing what Lynae knows and hinting at darker waters beneath the surface. Lynae, calm and guarded, parries each thrust with cool composure and a faint baring of teeth, and the two women reach a wary truce that their pasts and paths should not cross again. Beneath the polite understanding, Arissa privately plots to test whether Lynae can back up her lofty threats.
